In a perfect world…
• Your Prelaunch will have people standing in line
to buy when you open cart…
In reality…
• You need to have a strong sales video or sales
letter that will move people to buy
The number one thing to remember…
• It’s not about the stuff…
• It’s about the transformation
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
Understand the transformation you’re giving
your avatar…
• What's their biggest problem, their biggest
struggle that they have?
• Why are they having that problem?
• What is the problem costing them? (right now, in
3 months, in a year…)
• Why can't they solve the problem on their own?
Understand the transformation you’re giving
your avatar…
• What are some of the most common mistakes
that people make who are trying to solve this
problem?
• What are some of the biggest misconceptions
about the problem?
• How would someone fix or solve this problem
and how does your solution tie in?
Understand the transformation you’re giving
your avatar…
• How will their life and the people around them -
their lives, be better?
• Remember – people are either avoiding pain… or
they’re moving toward pleasure
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
Here’s a framework for your sales letter or sales
video…
• Headline
• Subheadline
• What’s the big promise or big hook
• Opportunity and Transformation
• Authority
• Proof and testimonials
Here’s a framework for your sales letter or sales
video…
• Foreshadow urgency
• Make your offer
• What makes your offer different from other
people’s products?
• How does it work?
• What is the stuff they get?
• Details of how and when they get it…
Here’s a framework for your sales letter or sales
video…
• Bonuses
• Raise and answer objections
• Reveal the price and price
comparison/justification
• Payment methods
• What to do (click the button, etc.)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	5
Here’s a framework for your sales letter or sales
video…
• Scarcity and urgency
• Product coming off the market
• The price is going up
• Or bonuses are going away
Here’s a framework for your sales letter or sales
video…
• Call to action – ask for the sale
• Risk reversal (guarantee)
• Surprise bonus
• Re-close
Here’s a framework for your sales letter or sales
video…
• Revisit scarcity
• Social proof
• Final call to action
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
